businesses.layer1_comment: Founded 1994 by Jerry Hendrix, sold 1998 to current owner 'Bill' (per Yelp reviews mentioning Bill as longtime owner). 32-yr operating history at this Longview location. Current owner Bill likely 65-75. License-tenure proxy.
businesses.layer2_comment: 500+ unit state-of-the-art facility (1994 buildout). Longview East TX market. 32-yr operating history. Long-term manager Ruth mentioned in reviews. ~$1-1.5M annual rev. SBA 7(a) financeable.
businesses.layer3_comment: Tells: (1) Single legacy facility (Cubby Hole expanded under different brand/structure to multi-state); (2) 28-yr current-owner tenure (Bill since 1998); (3) Long-tenure manager Ruth — possible operator-successor candidate; (4) Personally-managed feel in reviews. Live-fetch successor protocol incomplete — need to confirm Ruth's role (employee vs operator-successor).
businesses.layer4_comment: Longview East TX = tertiary market -3; less rollup demand than top-4 metros. ETA/individual buyer pull only.
businesses.final_comment: Cubby Hole Texas (Longview) — owner 'Bill' (since 1998 from founder Jerry Hendrix), 28-yr tenure, single 500+ unit facility, long-tenure manager Ruth. Outside priority counties (East TX). B-tier: classic legacy single-facility East TX independent with possible internal operator-successor in Ruth. Needs verification of Ruth's role + Gregg CAD parcel search + SOS officer search.
businesses.value_add_thesis: Single 32-yr East TX legacy facility, owner Bill aging. Verify if longtime manager Ruth is internal successor or pure employee. Acquire as East TX standalone (lower-multiple secondary market); modernize PMS + add online rental; sustain Bill as paid consultant during transition.
